findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic/Galois.lean:202:theorem aut_mul_self_eq_one ... : σ * σ = 1`; the new theorem states the same with `σ := coordinateSignChangeAut hroot hindep j`.
findings.fix: Remove this theorem and use `aut_mul_self_eq_one hroot (coordinateSignChangeAut hroot hindep j)` at call sites.
findings.issue: `coordinateSignChangeAut_mul_self` is only the coordinate special case of the existing simp theorem `aut_mul_self_eq_one`, so it adds a parallel API for the same fact.

findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic/Galois.lean:218:theorem aut_commute ... : Commute a b`; the new proof is exactly `aut_commute hroot _ _`.
findings.fix: Remove this theorem and use `aut_commute hroot (coordinateSignChangeAut hroot hindep i) (coordinateSignChangeAut hroot hindep j)` instead.
findings.issue: `coordinateSignChangeAut_commute` is just a renamed coordinate special case of the existing `aut_commute` theorem.

summary: The main sign-change definitions are new named packaging, but the coordinate involution and commutativity lemmas duplicate existing general multiquadratic automorphism API.
